title: Quality Gate Insights
description: Gate pass/fail rates, common failures, security findings

panels.title: Gate Pass/Fail Rates
panels.query: SELECT operation_name as gate, SUM(CASE WHEN gate_status = 'pass' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as passed, SUM(CASE WHEN gate_status = 'fail' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'gates.gate_%' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY gate

panels.title: Average Gate Duration (ms)
panels.query: SELECT operation_name as gate, ROUND(AVG(CAST(gate_duration_ms AS DOUBLE)) / 1000, 0) as avg_ms FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'gates.gate_%' AND gate_duration_ms IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY gate ORDER BY avg_ms DESC

panels.title: Security Findings by CWE
panels.query: SELECT security_cwe_ids as cwe, COUNT(*) as count FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'gates.gate_3_security' AND security_cwe_ids IS NOT NULL AND security_cwe_ids != '' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY cwe ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: Secret Findings Per Day
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, SUM(CAST(gate_findings_count AS INT)) as total_findings FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'gates.gate_2_secrets' AND gate_status = 'fail' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Gate Failures Over Time
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, operation_name as gate, COUNT(*) as failures FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'gates.gate_%' AND gate_status = 'fail' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day, gate ORDER BY day
